data: {"generalSituation":"Tropical Cyclone Noul will move across the northeastern part of the South China Sea and intensify gradually today, edging closer to the coast of eastern Guangdong today and tomorrow. However, there are still uncertainties in its landfall position and its distance from Hong Kong. It is expected to be windy with heavy squally showers and thunderstorms over the coast of Guangdong later today and tomorrow. Seas will be rough with swells. There will still be showers over the region early next week. Under the influence of a broad trough of low pressure, the weather will be unsettled over the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of Guangdong midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260725","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"West to northwest force 4 to 5, force 5 to 6 later, force 7 offshore and on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Becoming cloudy. Very hot with sunny periods during the day. Occasional squally showers and thunderstorms later.
